_note: Token values confirmed from Figma MCP extraction (node 5126:426). Three content types: only Title, title + description, full.

--surface/neutral/default.description: Container background fill. Shared with Action Menu container.

--spacing-12.description: Gap between left icon and text container.

minHeight.description: Minimum height of the item row. Grows with content in multi-line types.

maxWidth.description: Maximum width of the text area (title, subtitle, description).

--spacing-4.description: Gap between text lines in multi-line content types (title + description, full).

lineHeight.description: Line height applied to the text container in multi-line types.

--letter-spacing/normal.description: Letter spacing applied to all text elements.

whitespace.description: Title is single-line (only Title type). May wrap in multi-line types within the text container max-width.

subtitle._note: Subtitle is shown in the 'full' type only. Same typographic style as description.

size.description: Width and height of the left icon.

leftIcon.note: Optional. Default: shown. Placeholder icon in Figma: Customer-Icon/phone-call.

size.description: Width and height of the right icon.

rightIcon.note: Optional. Default: shown (chevron-right). Can be replaced with a custom element.

hover._note: TODO: Not defined in Figma. Confirm appearance and token values.

pressed._note: TODO: Not defined in Figma. Confirm appearance and token values.

disabled._note: TODO: Not defined in Figma. Confirm appearance and token values.

focus._note: TODO: Not defined in Figma. Confirm focus ring treatment.
